text: Section 10. Subcontract Sum and Payment. The Contractor agrees to pay the Subcontractor for the full and faithful and timely performance of the Subcontract Work  the sum  of ONE  HUNDRED  SIXTY-ONE THOUSAND  TWO  HUNDRED  TWENTY-SEVEN  DOLLARS  AND  ZERO  CENTS ( $161,227.00 )  (the 'Subcontract Sum') in current funds, subject to additions and deductions for changes as may be agreed upon in writing signed by authorized representatives of Contractor and Subcontractor, or provided for herein, and subject to all terms and conditions of payment under the Contract Documents. Provided, that no payments will be made unless this  Subcontractor's rate of progress, work done and material furnished are satisfactory to the Contractor and as herein agreed upon.
